background.occupation: Freelance social media content creator and occasional food delivery driver
background.key_experience: Had a viral TikTok video about gig worker rights that got 500k views but was demonetized by the platform for 'political content' - now believes all tech companies deliberately suppress worker organizing while pretending to support it

dominant_traits: Very High Neuroticism (constantly anxious about income stability)
Very Low Conscientiousness (chaotic work schedule, last-minute everything)
Very High Openness to Experience (jumps on every new app/trend immediately)

cognition.core_value: Algorithmic fairness should override corporate profit - platforms owe their success to creators and should share revenue transparently
cognition.bias: Availability bias - whatever viral take she saw most recently on Twitter/TikTok becomes her entire personality for 48 hours, especially if it involves tech company criticism

current_state.recent_memory: Yesterday saw three different influencers she follows all posting about how Instagram's new algorithm is 'killing small creators'
current_state.emotion: Cynical excitement - simultaneously convinced the tech industry is collapsing while eagerly downloading the newest viral social app everyone says will replace it
